title: Spicy Gooey Ethiopian Apricot Jam Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix dish featuring spicy gooey apricot jam stir-fried with minimal ingredients to serve as a satisfying snack or side dish.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix apricot jam with sesame seeds and optional red pepper flakes and turmeric powder. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the spice mixture to the heated skillet and cook for about 1 minute, or until the jam starts bubbling and thickens slightly.
Serve warm as is or with gluten-free bread.
